Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER AIKMAN STRUCTURE FINANCE LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment is granted. No opposition filed and for good cause shown. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
